overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval coastal town at night. The character traverses grassy paths, stone stairs, a gatehouse tunnel, and cliffside walkways illuminated by torchlight against a deep blue starry sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy approach to medieval town walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a grassy path toward illuminated stone fortifications

entered.detail: large stone building with arched entrance and lit windows ahead
dark stone and timber wall running along the right side
fire pits illuminating the path entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a grassy path leading toward a medieval stone gatehouse illuminated by torchlight. The camera follows the character from behind as he approaches the town walls, with a timber-fortified wall on the right and burning braziers on the left marking the entrance.

events.description: transitions from grassy path to wide stone staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs alongside a half-timbered medieval building

entered.detail: wide stone steps leading upward along the wall
medieval building with exposed wooden beams and lit windows

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a long stone staircase flanked by a half-timbered building on the right. The path is illuminated by warm torchlight against the cool night sky as the character climbs toward the wooden gate at the top of the stairs.

events.description: passes through heavy wooden gates into the stone archway tunnel
emerges from dark tunnel into open coastal area with panoramic ocean view

agents.ego_description: passing through the gate tunnel from the enclosed town to the open cliffside

entered.detail: thick stone archway with open wooden doors
open view of night sky and dark ocean beyond the gate

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the heavy wooden gates of the town wall, traversing the short stone tunnel. Upon emerging, the scene opens dramatically to a coastal cliffside with a panoramic view of the dark ocean and starry sky beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff walkway with ocean overlook

events.description: fully emerges onto open cliffside path with expansive ocean views

agents.ego_description: walking along the cobblestone cliff edge overlooking the water, passing burning fire pits

notable_agents.action: guard standing watch near a fire pit at the cliff edge

entered.detail: tall white stone tower with lit windows perched on the cliff edge
burning braziers lining the path along the cliff
small stone building with red roof tiles

segments.scene_description: Walking along the windswept coastal path, the character passes burning fire pits and a guard standing watch. The white stone watchtower stands prominently ahead against the dark ocean backdrop, while a small cottage sits on the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside path approaching watchtower with cottages

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding cliff path toward the watchtower, approaching villagers near the tower base

notable_agents.action: group of villagers gathered near a fire outside the tower entrance
guard in red armor standing by the cottage wall

entered.detail: low stone wall supporting the cliffside cottages
rocky outcroppings at the path edge dropping to the water

segments.scene_description: The path continues toward the watchtower, now much closer, with villagers visible near its base. The character passes a guard standing by stone cottages on the left while the rocky cliff edge drops away to the dark sea on the right. Fire pits continue to illuminate the winding cobblestone path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered landward approach into a wide, windswept coastal fortification under a starry night sky. It begins on a grassy path leading toward a medieval stone gatehouse, where the camera follows the character past burning braziers and timber-fortified walls. As the character ascends a long stone staircase flanked by half-timbered buildings, the scene shifts through a heavy wooden gate and a short stone tunnel. Upon emerging, the view opens dramatically to a panoramic coastal cliffside, where the camera tracks along a path lined with fire pits and a small cottage. The movement finally leads toward a prominent white stone watchtower, passing guards and villagers as the cobblestone path winds along the rocky edge of the dark ocean.
